templates.name: homepage
templates.description: Main site homepage with hero carousel, education cards, blog posts, online offers carousel, promotions grid, and new products grid

templates.name: category-landing
templates.description: Legacy AEM full-width category landing page with mondrian hero, sub-category card grids, and promotional offers. Uses parsys-based components. ~8 instances including newly discovered electron-microscopy and semiconductors sections.

templates.name: sub-category
templates.description: New AEM sub-category page with page-heading hero, section containers, teaser cards, CTA lists, and text-image blocks. Uses cmp-* component library, full-width, no sidebar. ~200+ pages across life-science, clinical, digital-solutions, and industrial sub-sections.

templates.name: product-detail
templates.description: Product detail page with foreground-image hero, product sub-navigation bar (Overview/Features/Models/etc.), teaser sections, and CTA items. Uses cmp-* system with cmp-p-manualnav. Found at depth 4-6 across life-science and industrial sections.

templates.name: brand-landing
templates.description: Legacy AEM brand landing page with left sidebar navigation (popular products, applications, resources), anchor-nav main content, and multi-column link lists. 82 URLs discovered under /brands/ including sub-brand product pages.

templates.name: support-how-to
templates.description: Support how-to page with foreground-image hero, sticky anchor navigation list, and sequential text-heavy instructional sections with screenshots. Uses cmp-* system with cmp-anchorlist. 11 pages under /support/.

templates.name: support-center
templates.description: Technical support center hub with left sidebar navigation and main content area with sub-topic card grids. Legacy AEM with complementary sidebar. 26 URLs under /technical-resources/ including ~20 support centers with sub-pages (e.g., cell-analysis-support-center has 12 sub-topic pages).

templates.name: promotions
templates.description: Promotions listing page with page heading, featured promo hero cards, filter buttons (All/Percentage Off/Special Deal/Funding), and dynamic merchandising offer card grid with promo badges.

templates.name: events-listing
templates.description: Events and webinars listing page with search/filter box and table-based event listing showing title, date, location, description, and thumbnail for each event.

templates.name: event-detail
templates.description: Individual event/webinar detail page with event-specific hero, date/location info, description, registration CTA, and related content. 7 instances discovered under /events/.

templates.name: legal-policy
templates.description: Legal/policy text page with left sidebar navigation (related legal pages) and text-heavy main content with paragraphs, lists, and PDF links. Legacy AEM with complementary sidebar. 43 URLs under /global/ including sub-policies.

templates.name: gated-form
templates.description: Gated content form page for webinar registration, resource downloads, and quote requests. Contains form fields (name, email, company) and content description. 17 URLs discovered under /global/forms/.

templates.name: order
templates.description: Product ordering hub with hero, tabs container (5 tabs: Select system, Handbook, Webinars, Publications, Technical resources), product-list with pricing/add-to-cart, and data-list tables.

templates.name: image-gallery
templates.description: Masonry image gallery with category dropdown filter, displaying 100+ scientific images as filterable tiles. Spreadsheet-backed content.

templates.name: data-list
templates.description: Filterable data table page with left sidebar facet filters (tissue type, tissue, primary), search bar, and large sortable table (500+ rows). Spreadsheet-backed content.

templates.name: protocol-detail
templates.description: Protocol/reference detail page with static table (2-column procedure steps), text paragraphs, and related protocol links. 220 protocol pages discovered across 9 categories under /references/protocols/.

templates.name: reference-article
templates.description: Technical reference article page with text-heavy educational content, figures, and related article links. 370 URLs under /references/ambion-tech-support/ organized into general-articles/ and tech-notes/ sub-sections across 18 topic categories.

templates.name: reference-handbook
templates.description: Multi-chapter educational handbook/reference with table of contents navigation, chapter pages, and technical notes. 87 URLs across molecular-probes-the-handbook (65 chapters), gibco-cell-culture-basics (22 sections), and newsletters-and-journals (22 issues).

templates.name: learning-center
templates.description: Educational learning center hub with topic navigation, educational content cards, video resources, and application notes. 6+ instances discovered across industrial and life-science sections.

templates.name: promo-offer
templates.description: Individual promotional offer landing page with hero banner, promotional details, product highlights, and CTA buttons. 15 URLs discovered under /o/ across /o/a/, /o/b/, and /o/c/ sub-paths.

templates.name: partnering
templates.description: Partnering and OEM commercial supply pages with hero, informational tiles, capability descriptions, and contact CTAs. 12 URLs under /about-us/partnering-licensing/ covering industry verticals (animal-health, forensics, diagnostics, etc.).

templates.name: services
templates.description: Services landing and detail pages for CDMO, custom services, instrument qualification, lab services, and training. 24 URLs under /products-and-services/ including sub-service detail pages.
